$comment: Single source of truth for all AI skills. Each tool loads from .ai/skills/<name>/SKILL.md

skills.name: brainstorming
skills.description: Use before any creative work - creating features, building components, adding functionality, or modifying behavior. Explores user intent, requirements and design before implementation.

skills.name: changelog-generator
skills.description: Automatically creates user-facing changelogs from git commits by analyzing commit history, categorizing changes, and transforming technical commits into clear, customer-friendly release notes.

skills.name: dispatching-parallel-agents
skills.description: Use when facing 2+ independent tasks that can be worked on without shared state or sequential dependencies.

skills.name: error-handling-patterns
skills.description: Master error handling patterns across languages including exceptions, Result types, error propagation, and graceful degradation.

skills.name: executing-plans
skills.description: Use when you have a written implementation plan to execute in a separate session with review checkpoints.

skills.name: finishing-a-development-branch
skills.description: Use when implementation is complete, all tests pass, and you need to decide how to integrate the work.

skills.name: interface-design
skills.description: For interface design - dashboards, admin panels, apps, tools, and interactive products. NOT for marketing design.

skills.name: mobile-design
skills.description: Mobile-first design and engineering doctrine for iOS and Android apps. Covers touch interaction, performance, platform conventions, offline behavior.

skills.name: react-native-best-practices
skills.description: React Native performance optimization guidelines for FPS, TTI, bundle size, memory leaks, re-renders, and animations.

skills.name: receiving-code-review
skills.description: Use when receiving code review feedback, before implementing suggestions.

skills.name: requesting-code-review
skills.description: Use when completing tasks, implementing major features, or before merging to verify work meets requirements.

skills.name: repo-self-improvement
skills.description: Use when repeated project mistakes, review feedback, failed commands, onboarding friction, or team workflow lessons should become reusable AI development behavior for this repo.

skills.name: subagent-driven-development
skills.description: Use when executing implementation plans with independent tasks in the current session.

skills.name: supabase-postgres-best-practices
skills.description: Postgres performance optimization and best practices from Supabase. Use when writing, reviewing, or optimizing Postgres queries, schema designs, or database configurations.

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.description: Use when encountering any bug, test failure, or unexpected behavior, before proposing fixes.

skills.name: test-driven-development
skills.description: Use when implementing any feature or bugfix, before writing implementation code.

skills.name: using-git-worktrees
skills.description: Use when starting feature work that needs isolation from current workspace or before executing implementation plans.

skills.name: using-superpowers
skills.description: Use when starting any conversation - establishes how to find and use skills.

skills.name: verification-before-completion
skills.description: Use when about to claim work is complete, fixed, or passing, before committing or creating PRs.

skills.name: writing-plans
skills.description: Use when you have a spec or requirements for a multi-step task, before touching code.

skills.name: writing-skills
skills.description: Use when creating new skills, editing existing skills, or verifying skills work before deployment.

skills.name: postgresql-skill
skills.description: PostgreSQL-specific patterns for database design, optimization, and transaction management.

context.name: bolt
context.description: Lessons learned from Bolt - batch processing and stock reservation patterns

context.name: sentinel
context.description: Security learnings - timing attacks, XSS prevention
